notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Demonology Warlock gear guide (anchor phase-4-andamp-5-tier-10). Tier set: Sanctified Dark Coven line — this spec keeps the tier legs (unlike Affliction/Destruction, which swap to a non-tier drop). Correction: Icy Veins' own table mistakenly repeats the Helm item in the Shoulders row (site error, see Affliction notes) — shoulder name inferred from the mage/priest "Shoulderpads" tier naming pattern. Enchants/gems shared by all three warlock specs.

items.name: Amulet of the Silent Eulogy
items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — Icecrown Gunship Battle — Armory

items.name: Greatcloak of the Turned Champion
items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — Deathbringer Saurfang's Cache

items.source: The Ashen Verdict — reward from Path of Destruction

items.name: Bloodsurge, Kel'Thuzad's Blade of Agony
items.source: Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic — The Lich King

enchants.name: Arcanum of Burning Mysteries
enchants.source: The Kirin Tor — Revered (Arcanum of Power alternative)

enchants.name: Greater Inscription of the Storm
enchants.source: Sons of Hodir — Exalted (Master's Inscription of the Storm for scribes)

enchants.name: Enchant Cloak — Greater Speed
enchants.source: Enchanting (Lightweave Embroidery for tailors; Springy Arachnoweave for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Superior Spellpower
enchants.source: Enchanting (Fur Lining — Spell Power for leatherworkers)

enchants.name: Enchant Boots — Tuskarr's Vitality
enchants.source: Enchanting (Icewalker alternative; Nitro Boosts for engineers)

enchants.name: Enchant Staff — Greater Spellpower
enchants.source: Enchanting (staff); Enchant Weapon — Mighty Spellpower for main-hand

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 spellpower, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare)
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit), Rigid King's Amber for socket bonus
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
